{{Expand}}

{{Infobox concept
| name = Path of the Last Leaf
| introduced = Skysworn
}}

== Skysworn ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|The [[Path of the Last Leaf]] is a school whose [[sacred arts]] turn trees into deadly weapons.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c8">''Skysworn'', chapter 8</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Concepts]]
[[Category:Skysworn]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle concepts]]
[[Category:Terminology]]
